title: Roses Get Polished
description:
Now for Part 2 of the Kinetic Circuits: Rudimentary Processors! These will allow you to create computers, unlock Mekanism, and more! Assuming you have a simple ME network and properly automated Vacuum Tubes, this shouldn't be too hard. First Things First, you need to make a Tesla Coil to make Electrum.

Get yourself some Rose Quartz and start working on Create Crafters, if you haven't already.
